metadata.name: L1 beta runway patch through 2026-07-20
metadata.reason: Fill the rolling 8-week launch audit window for the first Positives beta invite gate.

weekly_principles.title: Practicing the Response You Want to Become
weekly_principles.excerpt: Repeated responses quietly become the life you recognize as yours.
weekly_principles.body: A response is never only about the moment in front of you. Each response is also a small vote for the kind of person you are practicing becoming. This week is about choosing the response you want to strengthen: honest without being harsh, calm without being passive, and responsible without carrying what was never yours.
weekly_principles.reflection_prompt: What response do you want to practice often enough that it starts to feel like who you are?
weekly_principles.admin_notes: Beta runway scaffold patch generated 2026-05-26. Placeholder audio/copy; replace with final approved Dr. Paul/Castos content before broad launch.

daily_audios.title: Choosing a Cleaner Response
daily_audios.excerpt: A cleaner response leaves less repair work behind.
daily_audios.reflection_prompt: Where could you practice this today: choosing a cleaner response? Name one specific moment where it would change your response.
daily_audios.admin_notes: Beta runway scaffold patch generated 2026-05-26. Placeholder audio/copy; replace with final approved Dr. Paul/Castos content before broad launch.

daily_audios.title: Letting the Moment Breathe
daily_audios.excerpt: Not every moment needs an immediate answer.
daily_audios.reflection_prompt: Where could you practice this today: letting the moment breathe? Name one specific moment where it would change your response.
daily_audios.admin_notes: Beta runway scaffold patch generated 2026-05-26. Placeholder audio/copy; replace with final approved Dr. Paul/Castos content before broad launch.

daily_audios.title: The Gift of Not Reacting
daily_audios.excerpt: Sometimes the strongest response is the one you do not rush.
daily_audios.reflection_prompt: Where could you practice this today: the gift of not reacting? Name one specific moment where it would change your response.
daily_audios.admin_notes: Beta runway scaffold patch generated 2026-05-26. Placeholder audio/copy; replace with final approved Dr. Paul/Castos content before broad launch.

daily_audios.title: Practicing Who You Are Becoming
daily_audios.excerpt: Today is one more chance to practice the response you want to strengthen.
daily_audios.reflection_prompt: Where could you practice this today: practicing who you are becoming? Name one specific moment where it would change your response.
